title: narcissus radiiflorus subsp. stellaris
intro: Narcissus radiiflorus subsp. stellaris, also known as the Star-flowered Daffodil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its unique star-shaped flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids like galantamine and lycorine. The health benefits of Narcissus radiiflorus subsp. stellaris include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues, as well as its antiseptic properties which may help to treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to exercise caution due to its potential toxicity and overdose risks.
